zh.Nesle, Somme, Picardy, France: 法國皮卡迪索姆內斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Nesle於1150年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆內斯爾時，他的父親Raoul de Nesle II43歲，母親Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres21歲。他於1175年與Elizabeth de Lambersart結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年7月14日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Nesle于1150年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆內斯爾时，他的父亲Raoul de Nesle II43岁，母亲Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres21岁。他于1175年与Elizabeth de Lambersart结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年7月14日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nesle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of the female medieval personal name Nes, a short form of Agnes .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: English; French (Agnès); Hungarian (Ágnes): from a female personal name, which is from Late Latin Agnes and this one from Greek Hagnē, from hagnē ‘pure, chaste’. Saint Agnes was a Christian virgin martyr, one of those who suffered under the persecutions of Diocletian in 303 AD . Her name was associated by folk etymology with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, and in medieval art she is often depicted with a lamb (the lamb of God). See also English Annis .

American shortened (and altered) form of rare Greek metronymics Agnidis or Agniadis, both derived from the female personal name Hagnē (see 1 above), or of patronymics like Anagnostopoulos (compare Agnew 4).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Nesle was born in 1150, in Nesle, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Raoul de Nesle II, was 43 and his mother, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, was 21. He married Elizabeth de Lambersart in 1175. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 July 1197, in Brugge, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Nesle est né en 1150, à Nesle, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Raoul de Nesle II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Lambersart en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1197, à Brugge, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Nesle 1150 in Nesle, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul de Nesle II 43 und seine Mutter Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres 21. Er hat 1175 Elizabeth de Lambersart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1197 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Brugge, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Nesle è nato il nel 1150 nel Nesle, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul de Nesle II, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Lambersart nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1197, nel Brugge, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Nesleが1150年にフランスピカーディソンメネスルで生まれた時，父Raoul de Nesle IIは43歳，母Gertrude de Lorraine de flandresは21歳であった。1175年にElizabeth de Lambersartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年7月14日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Nesle(이)가 1150년 프랑스 피카디 솜 네슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul de Nesle II(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1175년 Elizabeth de Lambersart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 7월 14일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브루지에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Nesle nasceu em 1150, em Nesle, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Raoul de Nesle II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Lambersart em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1197, em Brugge, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Nesle родился в 1150 г. в местности несл, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul de Nesle II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Lambersart в 1175 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 июля 1197 г. в местности бруг, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Nesle nació en 1150, en Nesle, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Nesle II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Lambersart en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1197, en Brugge, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 47 años.
